mission.title: fluent-bit: Add namespace_labels to kubernetes metadata
mission.description: Add namespace_labels to kubernetes metadata. Requested by 14+ users.

steps.title: Check current fluent-bit deployment
steps.description:
Verify your fluent-bit version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit
helm list -n fluent-bit 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working fluent-bit installation.

steps.title: Review fluent-bit configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant fluent-bit configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit
kubectl get configmap -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluent-bit
```
What is the problem:
We are using fluentbit for our logcollection. The output flows through fluentd to logstash to ES. In ES we find that we only get a subset of kubernetes metadata in the index.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add namespace_labels to kubernetes metadata
steps.description:
This provides the ability to have the filter_kubernetes plugin fetch namespace labels & annotations and add them to the record under a `kubernetes_namespace` key. 

- Added 3 new configuration options:
   - `kube_meta_namespace_cache_ttl` - `FLB_CONFIG_MAP_TIME` - the TTL for the namespace cache
  
```yaml
[FILTER]
    Name kubernetes
    Match kube*
    K8S-Logging.Parser Off
    K8S-Logging.Exclude Off
    Use_Kubelet On
    Buffer_Size  1MB
    Annotations Off
    namespace_labels  On
    namespace_annotations On
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit
kubectl get events -n fluent-bit --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Add namespace_labels to kubernetes metadata" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: This provides the ability to have the filter_kubernetes plugin fetch namespace labels & annotations and add them to the record under a `kubernetes_namespace` key.
codeSnippets:
[FILTER]
    Name kubernetes
    Match kube*
    K8S-Logging.Parser Off
    K8S-Logging.Exclude Off
    Use_Kubelet On
    Buffer_Size  1MB
    Annotations Off
    namespace_labels  On
    namespace_annotations On

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with fluent-bit installed or the issue environment reproducible.
